standard_variable.semantic_intent: source-recorded renal replacement therapy fluid-removal event

database_mapping.source_grain: one Amsterdam numericitems row for itemid 8805 or 8806
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained approved RRT fluid-removal event row

identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: not available for Amsterdam ICU/MC local-admission semantics
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: Amsterdam admissionid under ICU/MC local-admission semantics

included_scope: 8805 / CVVH Onttrokken as approved CRRT/CVVH removed-volume row
8806 / Hemodialyse onttrekken as approved hemodialysis removed-volume row
mapping_specific_notes: This mapping approves Amsterdam same-name publication under a source-event-primary rule.
Rows are retained even when expected parent overlap is missing, with parent_link_status and parent_link_missing_caution_flag.
No rate setting, cumulative counter, access line, active flag, or modality episode is promoted into the event numerator.
adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: Amsterdam explicit numeric volume rows are narrow enough to support the same-name event stream without importing adjacent non-event semantics; parent links provide context and caution rather than a hard inclusion gate.

event_stream_build_translation.event_time_translation: retain event_time_primary_ms_raw as charttime_offset_ms_raw and event_time_primary_minutes_relative as charttime_minutes_relative
event_stream_build_translation.event_value_translation: copy numericitems.value to fluid_removal_value_ml when unit is ml
event_stream_build_translation.unit_translation: retain source unit and write standard_unit=mL for approved rows
event_stream_build_translation.context_translation: 8805 maps to CVVH approved context and 8806 maps to IHD approved context; source itemid, label, unit, family, modality, and bridge role are retained
event_stream_build_translation.parent_link_translation: link 8805 rows to std_crrt_family_active and 8806 rows to std_non_crrt_rrt_active when event time falls inside an approved parent interval; otherwise retain missing-parent caution
event_stream_build_translation.downstream_aggregation_translation: do not smooth, back-shift, difference counters, or summarize; this approved mapping remains event-level
event_stream_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no itemid 8805/8806 numeric event under this approved mapping, not absence of RRT support

validation_contract.no_row_policy_check: absence of row is not universal proof of no RRT support or no unrecorded extracorporeal removal
validation_contract.unit_check: standard_unit must be mL for all retained rows
validation_contract.parent_context_caution_check: parent-link absence is retained as a caution because the approved rule is source-event-primary rather than parent-required
notes: This is a formal Amsterdam same-name approval mapping.
Parent-link absence is retained as a caution rather than an exclusion.
Rate settings and cumulative counters remain outside this approved execution.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint runs the approved Amsterdam same-name mapping under the source-event-primary rule.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal Amsterdam std_rrt_fluid_removal_event outputs should be produced only through this governed path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
